allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/pytest.exe --collect-only -q tests/unit/test_fish_exceptions.py tests/unit/test_fish_schemas.py tests/unit/test_fish_service.py tests/integration/test_fish_repository.py tests/integration/test_fish_api.py)

Bash(grep -n "^FAILED\\|^ERROR" /tmp/pytest_full.log | head -5; echo "---first error trace---"; grep -n "^_____\\|^ERROR at setup\\|Error\\b" /tmp/pytest_full.log | head -3; echo "---"; awk '/= ERRORS =/{f=1} f' /tmp/pytest_full.log | head -80)
